hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *.env|*.env.local|*.env.production|*.env.development|bun.lock|bun.lockb) echo 'BLOCKED: Do not edit env or lock files directly' && exit 1;; *) exit 0;; esac
case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.mjs) npx eslint --fix "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" || echo "ESLint reported issues in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATH";; esac
case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in */schema.prisma) bun run db:generate && bun run type-check || echo 'Type errors found after schema change';; esac
